articles.title: Ethereum Future Hinges on Zero-Knowledge Proofs Says EF Director
articles.description: Ethereum Foundation co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang describes ZKP as central to Ethereum midterm roadmap with many amazing breakthroughs in past two years.

articles.title: Citrea Unveils US Treasury-Backed Stablecoin Using ZK Bitcoin Ecosystem
articles.description: First stablecoin issued through MoonPay launchpad aims to solve liquidity fragmentation by issuing natively on ZK-powered Citrea Bitcoin L2.

articles.title: Bank of England DLT Challenge Finds Trade Offs for Wholesale Settlement
articles.description: BoE and BIS Innovation Hub explore how blockchain and ZK technology could transform wholesale settlement infrastructure.

articles.title: AI Agents Need Identity and Zero-Knowledge Proofs Are the Solution
articles.description: ZKPs could become backbone of trusted AI and digital identity, giving individuals and orgs a way to interact safely across platforms and borders.

articles.title: Solana Alpenglow Consensus Overhaul Live for Testing
articles.description: Biggest consensus overhaul in Solana history moves to community test cluster with new cryptographic proving mechanisms for validators.

articles.title: Ethereum Clear Signing Standard Uses Cryptographic Verification Against Phishing
articles.description: New standard aims to prevent billions in losses from phishing by making transaction approvals safer with cryptographic proofs.

articles.title: NUVA Connects Figure 19B of Tokenized Assets to Ethereum
articles.description: Protocol led by veteran BNY executive aims to connect real-world assets with DeFi markets starting with HELOCs and Treasuries.

articles.title: Charles Schwab Begins US Rollout of Spot Crypto Trading for Retail
articles.description: Major brokerage launches spot cryptocurrency trading access for retail customers across the United States.

articles.title: JPMorgan Files to Launch New Tokenized Fund as Wall Street Race Heats Up
articles.description: JPMorgan enters tokenized fund space as competition intensifies among major Wall Street firms for digital asset products.

articles.title: Telecom Giant KDDI Acquires 14.9% Stake in Coincheck for 65M
articles.description: Japanese telecom signs business alliance for revenue sharing and customer referrals to expand crypto access in Japan.

articles.title: Societe Generale to Accept Tokenized Collateral on Canton Network
articles.description: SocGen announces plans to accept tokenized collateral as margin for Prime Services clients and launch repo on Canton.

articles.title: Ronin Transitions to Ethereum Layer 2 from Independent Sidechain
articles.description: Gaming blockchain Ronin executes hard fork to become Ethereum L2, improving security while maintaining high throughput for gaming.

articles.title: Metaplanet Delays Preferred Share Listing Amid Japanese Market Structure
articles.description: Bitcoin treasury company navigates challenging Japanese market structure for its preferred share listing plans.

articles.title: Zero-Knowledge Identity Startup Self Raises 9M with Points Program
articles.description: Self raised 9M to expand its ZKP identity platform and introduced rewards program to drive on-chain verification adoption.

articles.title: Stablecoin Yield Infrastructure Project Raises 13.5M Led by Sky Ecosystem
articles.description: New DeFi infrastructure startup secures funding to build stablecoin yield products for institutional market.

articles.title: Ledger Puts US IPO Plans on Hold Due to Market Conditions
articles.description: French crypto security firm reassesses potential 4B US listing as volatile conditions weigh on investor appetite for crypto IPOs.

articles.title: eToro Reiterates Commitment to Crypto Despite Falling Q1 Activity
articles.description: Trading platform maintains crypto strategy even as first quarter activity declines across the industry.

articles.title: LayerZero Apologizes for 292M Kelp Exploit Configuration Mistake
articles.description: Cross-chain protocol admits it allowed its DVN to act as single point of failure for high-value transactions.
